svg.title: Recommended local directory structure for NOAA CRW 5km data
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing the folder hierarchy mirroring the NOAA FTP server layout
svg.text: Climatology: single flat directory, 1 .nc file (12 monthly SST climatologies packed inside)
Annual / monthly: flat directories — no year subdirs. All years coexist by filename.
Daily: year subdirs are necessary (~365 files/yr × 40 yrs = 14,600 files in one dir otherwise)
Every .nc file keeps its original NOAA filename; .md5 sidecar sits beside it
summary/ is reserved for future consolidated parquet files across all measures
Repeat <measure>/ once per product: sst/ dhw/ ssta/ baa/ hs/ etc.
